title: eleutherostemon amplectens
intro: Eleutherostemon amplectens is a plant species in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the "false coca" due to its similarity in appearance to the coca plant. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and analgesic effects. Eleutherostemon amplectens is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, and are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
